name: base/contracts
description: Contract quality rules — component API health checks

rules.description: Component has no extractable props — analysis may have failed or component is trivial.
rules.fixHint: Ensure the component exports a typed Props interface or type alias.

rules.description: Component has more than 25 props — consider decomposing into smaller components.
rules.fixHint: Split into subcomponents or use a config object prop to reduce API surface.

rules.description: Component has more than 40 props — likely includes inherited HTML attributes. Review prop extraction.
rules.fixHint: Check if props include inherited HTML attributes. Use explicit Props type to limit surface.

rules.description: Interactive component should accept at least one event callback (onClick, onChange, etc.).
rules.fixHint: Add an "onClick" callback prop for user interaction handling.

rules.description: Select component should accept an "options" prop for list of choices.
rules.fixHint: Add an "options" prop: { value: string, label: string }[].
